case_title: SHANE J KROLL VS. RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KROLL, SHANE J AS TO DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT THE PARTIES REACHED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 9/14/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHANE J. KROLL OR DEFENDANT THE RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SC-150 FORM USED FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KROLL, SHANE J

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHANE J. KROLL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. TODAY'S MATTER WAS PREVIOUSLY SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT AS THE PARTIES HAD REACHED A SETTLEMENT AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 6/22/15. AS TESTIFIED TO BY MR. KROLL, DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC HAS NOT ADHERED TO THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DIANNE PEEBLES. FILED BY KROLL, SHANE J RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KROLL, SHANE J

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-08-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. CASE SETTLED BY COURT MEDIATORS."BY STIPULATION OF PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, CASE CONTINUED TO 11/8/16 ", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DEBORAH LYNN--AGENT FOR OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-11-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $58.38) SERVED MAY-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KROLL, SHANE J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,108.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, THE HEARING SET FOR SEP-14-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2016 - CASE RESOLVED PER PLAINTIFF. CASE CONTINUED, BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF, FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-27-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
